summary: Completed testing of LIVE mode bug fixes for Play to Learn. All 6 features verified as WORKING: (1) Duplicate participant prevention - same nickname returns same ID, (2) Late join to ACTIVE game goes directly to playing, (3) Polling fallback detects game started via GET session status, (4) Host de-duplicates players in UI, (5) English questions generated for English assignment, (6) True/False answer validation - 'true' for true statement is CORRECT.

test_credentials.test_assignment_english: pa_819f4878e48f4936 (Parts of Speech - Nouns and Verbs, language: en)

seed_data_creation: Created LIVE session ps_6a7c35d430f14797 with PIN 757083 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All LIVE mode bug fixes verified. Duplicate prevention works (same nickname returns same participant_id). Late join to ACTIVE game returns status='ACTIVE' so frontend starts immediately. Polling fallback works via GET /sessions/{id} returning status. Host view de-duplicates players. English questions generated in English.

elements_verified: Waiting Room lobby with player list
Went directly to quiz (not stuck in lobby)
Question in ENGLISH: 'Which word in the sentence is a NOUN?'
Live Players list shows 4 unique players

bug_1_duplicate_participant_prevention.description: Same nickname returns same participant_id instead of creating duplicate
bug_1_duplicate_participant_prevention.evidence: Backend test test_duplicate_join_returns_same_id passed - joining twice with 'DuplicateTestPlayer' returned same part_24af13e8efc9

bug_2_late_join_to_active_game.description: Late join to ACTIVE game returns status='ACTIVE' so frontend starts immediately
bug_2_late_join_to_active_game.evidence: Backend test test_late_join_returns_active_status passed. Playwright test showed student went directly to quiz.

bug_3_polling_fallback.description: Polling every 2 seconds detects game started via GET session status
bug_3_polling_fallback.evidence: GET /sessions/{id} returns status='ACTIVE' after start. Frontend code at lines 94-122 polls every 2 seconds.

bug_4_host_deduplicates_players.description: Host view de-duplicates players by nickname (case-insensitive)
bug_4_host_deduplicates_players.evidence: Playwright screenshot shows 4 unique players, DuplicateTestPlayer appears only once

bug_5_english_questions.evidence: Question displayed: 'Which word in the sentence is a NOUN? The curious puppy chased the ball across the yard.'

bug_6_true_false_validation.description: True/False answer validation - 'true' for true statement is CORRECT
bug_6_true_false_validation.evidence: Backend test test_true_answer_for_true_statement_is_correct passed - answering 'true' for is_true=True returns is_correct=True

verification_summary.backend_apis: All 14 tests PASSED - Duplicate prevention, late join, status transitions, English questions, True/False validation all working
verification_summary.frontend_pages: All LIVE mode flows working - Join form, lobby, late join to active game, host view with de-duplication
verification_summary.all_6_bugs_fixed: VERIFIED - (1) Duplicate prevention, (2) Late join to ACTIVE, (3) Polling fallback, (4) Host de-duplication, (5) English questions, (6) True/False validation
